slides.title: Go *calorie dense*
slides.body: Rice, oats, pasta, peanut butter, oils.

slides.title: *Drink* some
slides.body: Milk and shakes when you can't eat more.

slides.title: Still hit *protein*
slides.body: 1g per pound, even on a bulk.

slides.title: Eat *cheap*
slides.body: Eggs, rice, oats, chicken thighs, bananas.

slides.title: Eat *every day*
slides.body: A surplus over weeks, not one big meal.

slides.title: Eat for *size*.
slides.body: Vibe Health counts your calories and protein automatically.
slides.cta_text: search ‘Vibe Health’ on the App Store

caption:
